hooks.command: bunx mandu guard check-file "$FILE_PATH" --json --severity error 2>/dev/null || true

PreToolUse.description: Run architecture guard validation before modifying source files

hooks.command: node -e "const p=process.env.FILE_PATH||'';if(p.includes('spec/contracts/')){process.stdout.write('Contract modified. Run: bunx mandu guard contract --validate')}" 2>/dev/null || true

PostToolUse.description: Notify when contract files are modified
